CustomField.description: Pillar 5 policy controlling whether a tech can clear a blocking finding for this question via an exception override. "Inherit" defers to the template-level Allow_Exception_Override__c default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Inherit (default) uses the template setting. Allow lets the tech mark an exception with just a reason. Require photo additionally requires a photo. Disallow closes the override path so the failure must be remediated.
CustomField.label: Allow Exception Override
